title: [Cavern, Ledge]
description: You stand upon a precipitous ledge overlooking a vast cavern which drops frighteningly into the darkness.  You see a set of three wooden disks, suspended from the ceiling by thick chains, spaced evenly between your ledge and a similar one on the eastern side of the cavern.  With some skill you could probably jump onto the first disk from here.

wayto.36435:
;e waitfor 'The nearest disk, with no one on it, swings near the ledge'
move 'jump disk'
